title: error while drop the function which returns table_type
key_bug_features: drop function returning table_type causes error
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tbl1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name CHAR(20), value DECIMAL(10, 2));
INSERT INTO tbl1 (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Test', 123.45);
CREATE FUNCTION test_002() RETURNS TABLE (id INT, name CHAR(20)) AS $$ SELECT id, name FROM tbl1;
